chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-2437 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.11270/2019 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A No.10688/2019 4 For orders on M.A No.10689/2019 5. For hearing of main case 04.11.2019. Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Chang, advocate for petitioner = 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for stoppage of construction of pond for disposal of drainage and filthy water of Habib Sugar Mill District Shaheed Benazirabad, which according to learned counsel for the petitioner is creating environmental issues for the local inhabitant. If it is so, then the environmental issues could be checked upon adequately by Environmental Tribunal having jurisdiction and not by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. The instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
